full_text:
Lady Zhurong 祝融妃
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Lady Zhurong (祝融妃). Wife of King Meng Huo. Said to be descended from the Goddess of Fire. Lady Zhurong is a fictional character. Lady Zhurong was affiliated with Nanman.
Return to theThree Kingdoms Encyclopediaor browse theEncyclopedia Directory.
